name: TAP2 (Therapeutic Antibody Profiler)
description: Assess your antibody H/L sequence pair for developability issues: CDR length, the extent and magnitude of surface hydrophobicity, positive charge and negative charge in the CDRs, and asymmetry in the net heavy- and light-chain surface charges. Compare your antibody's properties to TAP2 thresholds determined from the updated ABodyBuilder2-modeled therapeutic set.
capabilities: Assess your antibody H/L sequence pair for developability issues: CDR length, the extent and magnitude of surface hydrophobicity, positive charge and negative charge in the CDRs, and asymmetry in the net heavy- and light-chain surface charges
Compare your antibody's properties to TAP2 thresholds determined from the updated ABodyBuilder2-modeled therapeutic set

heavy_chain.description: Antibody heavy chain amino acid sequence

light_chain.description: Antibody light chain amino acid sequence
